image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Here's what science actually says about IQ.
Context visual: IQ tests measure a range of cognitive abilities, not just what you think.
Escalation visual: It includes problem-solving, reasoning, and even your ability to learn.
Evidence visual: Research shows that while IQ can predict academic success, it doesn't measure creativity or emotional intelligence.
Payoff visual: So, IQ is just one piece of a much bigger puzzle of intelligence.
Cta visual: Curious about your own IQ? Check your learning style next! Like and follow for more insights!
